sales.title:
C. Hosidius C.f. Geta (ca. 68 or 64 BC). AR denarius (17mm, 3.72 gm, 4h). NGC MS S 5/5 - 5/5. Rome. GETA / III•VIR, draped bust of Diana right, seen from front, wearing stephane, pendant earring, and pendant necklace; bow and quiver over shoulder / C•HOSIDI C F, Calydonian Boar standing right, pierced by spear and harried by hound below. Crawford 407/2 (68 BC). Sydenham 904. Hosidia 2. Hersh/Walker (64 BC). Bright aqua and magenta toning on obverse with cherry blossom and marigold toning on reverse. HID05401242017 © 2025 Heritage Auctions | All Rights Reserved www.HA.com/TexasAuctioneerLicenseNotice
Ancients
sales.description: Heritage Auctions, Inc. | ['Auction #61555']

sales.title:
ROMAN REPUBLIC. C. Hosidus C. f. Geta. AR Denarius (3.90 gms), Rome Mint, ca. 68 B.C. NGC Ch VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 5/5.
Cr-407/2; Syd-903. Obverse: Diademed and draped bust of Diana, bow and quiver over shoulder; Reverse: Calydonian boar pierced by spear and attacked by hound.
From the Peter Jones M.D. Collection.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click here.
